meta.title: Title: DEF CON 32 - DEF CON Unplugged: Cocktails & Cyber with Jeff & Jen - Jen Easterly, Jeff Moss
meta.description: REAL WORLD DEFCON: Where hackers stop being polite and start getting real. The Dark Tangent and Jen Easterly sit down for an Ask Me Anything.
